name: presenting-information
description: Always-on presentation skill: tables, diagrams, annotated components, and structured design-chat layout using Unicode box-drawing. Reach for this whenever explaining, comparing, or proposing design.

interface.shortDescription: Visual-first presentation: tables, diagrams, annotated components
interface.longDescription: Produce high-quality Unicode box-drawing presentations for design, comparisons, architecture, UI mockups, flows, and annotated components. Strong user preference — reach for this whenever explaining, comparing, or proposing design instead of dense prose.
